[AI assistance for planning cancer treatment - OUTLOOK 29 May 2024. Nature ](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-024-01431-8)

[Is AI ruining our skills? Early results are in — and they’re not good - NEWS 18 June 2026. Nature](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-026-01947-1)

[Mathematicians are developing rules for AI use — other fields should follow - EDITORIAL
16 June 2026. Nature](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-026-01881-2)

[Why evaluating the impact of AI needs to start now - COMMENT 21 July 2025. Nature](https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-025-02266-7)
